name: Karate
description: Karate — OSS unified API, mock, and performance testing framework using a BDD DSL with zero external dependencies.

seo.title: Karate — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Karate: Karate — OSS unified API, mock, and performance testing framework using a BDD DSL with zero external dependencies.

when_to_use: API, mock, and performance tests in one BDD DSL
No Java code required for REST/GraphQL API testing
Built-in JSON/XML assertions with path expressions
Parallel execution of API scenarios without extra config

pros: Unified API, mock and perf testing in one tool
BDD DSL with no glue code, tests are the scenarios
Strong JSON/XML matching and schema support
cons: Custom DSL is not real Java, tooling limited
License moved to BSL 1.1 in recent versions
review.verdict: Very productive for API testing once you accept its DSL; license change deserves legal review.
review.best_for: QA teams doing heavy API and contract testing across microservices
review.not_for: Shops that want plain Java tests and a permissive open-source license
